name: The Golf Cavern
address: 1104 Park Ave S Suite 4, Park Rapids, MN 56470
about: The Golf Cavern is an unstaffed indoor golf simulator venue in Park Rapids, MN. It features two bays equipped with top-of-the-line GC Hawk launch monitors from Foresight Sports, running both FSX Play and GSPro software. The facility offers 24/7 access, allowing golfers to practice or play at any time. Pricing is based on an hourly rate, with monthly and annual membership plans available for those who play more frequently.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium GC Hawk launch monitor technology

food_and_drink.notes: No food is available on-site; guests are advised to use nearby facilities.
No alcohol is sold on-site; the venue does not appear to allow BYOB.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs to use at The Golf Cavern.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no food or drink available for purchase on-site. The facility does not mention a policy on bringing outside food or drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue suggests booking 1 hour per person to get through 18 holes.

faq.question: Is The Golf Cavern kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state that the venue is kid-friendly, nor does it mention any age restrictions or junior programs.
